name: homepage-desktop
title: Equilens — Algorithmic Compliance
heroLead: Equilens is the company behind FL-BSA, our self-hosted fair-lending bias-simulation appliance. We help regulated teams simulate lending models, review disparity outcomes, and generate regulator-oriented evidence packs1 without moving customer data outside their environment.
